title: Best Crypto to Buy Now: Kraken Launches Open Source CLI Giving AI Agents Direct Access to Crypto Markets as Pepeto’s 267x Exchange Presale Captures Every Agent Trade
description: Kraken announced the Kraken CLI, an open source single binary execution engine that gives AI agents and developers direct native access to crypto markets, signaling that autonomous trading is moving from experiment to production infrastructure. According to CoinDesk, the CLI means AI agents can now execute trades, pull market data, and manage portfolios without human [...]The post Best Crypto to Buy Now: Kraken Launches Open Source CLI Giving AI Agents Direct Access to Crypto Markets as Pepeto’s 267x Exchange Presale Captures Every Agent Trade appeared first on TechBullion.

title: Supreme Court to deploy AI system for case listing, bench allocation
description: The Supreme Court decision follows an internal probe that reportedly revealed systemic issues within the court registry, often leading to administrative lapses and irregularities in case allocation

title: AmCham, Korea's privacy chief discuss cross-border data rules for AI era
description: The American Chamber of Commerce in Korea hosted a policy dialogue Friday with Personal Information Protection Commission Chairperson Song Kyung-hee to discuss Korea’s data protection policies and the evolving role of trusted data use in the artificial intelligence era. The session, held at the Grand Hyatt Seoul, brought together about 80 representatives from AmCham member companies and the broader business community. title: Indian cloud provider NxtGen to build sovereign AI factory
description: The AI factory uses 4,000 GPUs across 512 servers in a 6,000 sq ft facility in Bengaluru.
